dashboards.title: Hospitality Domain Dashboard
dashboards.description: A Power BI dashboard analyzing hospitality data to track occupancy rates, revenue trends, and customer demographics.

dashboards.title: Bank Churn Dashboard
dashboards.description: A Power BI dashboard analyzing bank customer churn data to identify key factors causing customer attrition, such as poor service and credit card usage patterns.

dashboards.title: Facebook Dashboard
dashboards.description: A Power BI dashboard analyzing Facebook data to track engagement metrics, user demographics, and post performance.

dashboards.title: Netflix Dashboard
dashboards.description: A Power BI dashboard analyzing Netflix data to explore trends in viewership, popular genres, and user behavior.
